description: الحصول على إعدادات الشبكة الأساسية - IP, Subnet, Gateway, DNS
command_preview: Get-NetIPConfiguration | Select-Object InterfaceAlias, InterfaceDescription, @{N='IPv4';E={($_.IPv4Address).IPAddress}}, @{N='Subnet';E={($_.IPv4Address).PrefixLength}}, @{N='Gateway';E={($_.IPv4DefaultGateway).NextHop}}, @{N='DNS';E={($_.DNSServer | Where-Object {$_.AddressFamily -eq 2}).ServerAddresses -join ', '}} | Format-List
